---
name: "💡 Workflow Request"
description: "Request a workflow for a specific use case that you'd like someone to build"
title: "request: [Describe use case]"
labels: ["enhancement", "help wanted"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Workflow Request

### What is the use case?
Please describe the problem you are trying to solve or the automation you'd like to achieve. 
_Example: I want a workflow that automatically greets contributors on their first merged PR._

### Expected Triggers
When should this workflow run?
_Example: When a pull request is merged, or on a weekly schedule._

### Desired Actions
What exactly should the workflow do?
_Example: Add a label, post a comment, trigger a deployment, etc._

### Additional Context
Add any other context, existing GitHub Actions you think might be useful, or similar workflows you've seen elsewhere.
